[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000011 4
1 10000000 1
2 00011010 3
3 10111100 5
4 00111111 6
5 01010111 5
6 11100011 5
7 10101000 3

01 10 10010000 2
12 21 10010000 2
23 32 01010111 5 match 5
34 43 01000011 3
45 54 00100000 1
56 65 00100000 1
67 76 01100010 3
70 07 01101000 3

13 31 00010000 1
24 42 11000011 4 match 0
35 53 00000000 a
46 64 11100010 4
57 75 00101000 2
60 06 11100000 3
71 17 00000000 a

72 27 01001011 4
